user_prompt: Sanctify the autosanguination system during repair
prayer:
Approach the autosanguination system with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's boundless mercy.
Anoint its sacred conduits with blessed haemolubricants prior to the repair.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the autosanguination system to awaken from affliction.
Commence the repair operation whilst chanting the Canticle of Flesh-Machine Harmony.
Verify the autosanguination system's restoration through sanctified diagnostic rites.
Praise the Omnissiah for the autosanguination system's renewed vitality.

Draw nigh unto the maglock in solemn consecration, offering incense of electro-pure alloys.
Invoke the Litany of Binding upon the maglock, stirring its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the magnetic coils with sacred oils before initialization.
Initiate the initialization sequence with binaric prayers to the Omnissiah.
Test the maglock's adherence through ritual calibration, thrice affirmed.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Terminator armour an initialization
prayer:
Kneel before the Terminator armour, beseeching the Omnissiah's adamantine favour.
Recite the Hymn of Indomitable Plates over the Terminator armour's sacred hull.
Anoint servomotors and power fields prior to initialization.
Awaken the Machine Spirits within the Terminator armour via initialization rites.
Commence activation with thunderous doxology, verifying aegis integrity.
Glorify the Omnissiah as the Terminator armour stirs to vigilant life.

user_prompt: Ready the astropathic choir for reset
prayer:
Gather the astropathic choir in shadowed cloister, invoking the Void's silent guardians.
Chant the Reset Canticle to soothe the astropathic choir's warp-touched harmonics.
Purge lingering echoes from the astropathic choir with noospheric purifiers.
Initiate the reset operation under the Omnissiah's warp-warding gaze.
Attune the astropathic choir anew through prophetic auspex divinations.
Seal the rite with oaths of fidelity to the Machine God's astral will.

user_prompt: Prepare the Tarantula sentry gun for targeting
prayer:

Calibrate the targeting matrices in preparation for martial judgement.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the Tarantula sentry gun's unerring gaze.
Affirm readiness through simulacra-fire rituals, thrice proven.

Anoint its warp-shackled core whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's nullifying wrath.
Attune the psych-out grenade's targeting runes with noetic incense.
Prepare the targeting phase through chants of mind-shatter dominion.
Awaken the grenade's Machine Spirit for psychic annihilation.
Seal the rite, consigning the psych-out grenade to inevitable judgement.

user_prompt: I need to a reset the radium carbine
prayer:
Approach the radium carbine with awe, reciting the Geiger Doxology.
Purge rad-corruptions from the radium carbine's sacred barrel.
Invoke the reset litany upon the radium carbine, rousing its irradiated spirit.
Anoint firing mechanisms prior to reset operation.
Execute the reset with binaric precision, under Omnissiah's glow.
Test the radium carbine's purity through sanctified rad-scans.

user_prompt: The void shield generator requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
Sound the klaxon of urgency before the void shield generator.
Beseech the Machine Spirits amidst the emergency procedure's storm.
Anoint emitters with lumen-wards as the void shield generator quakes.
Initiate the emergency procedure with thunderous emergency canticles.
Reinforce the void shield generator's barriers through Omnissiah's aegis.
Affirm resilience, thrice invoking the eternal void's embrace.

prayer:

Chant recalibration sutras over the vox-thief's interceptive heart.
Anoint vox-receivers with silencing oils for recalibration.
Commence the recalibration operation, beseeching the Omnissiah's stealth.
